meta.project: Guides Travel Booking and Itinerary Management System

product_overview: Guides is a comprehensive Django-based web application that provides an end-to-end platform for travel planning, booking, and itinerary management. It offers rich destination data, tour management, personalized itineraries, bookings, reviews, rewards, emergency services, and transportation management, all accessible via a responsive web interface and a robust REST API.
core_goals: Enable seamless travel planning and booking for users by integrating destinations, tours, accommodations, and transportation services.
Provide detailed and searchable travel destination information with approval workflows to ensure accuracy and quality.
Offer personalized itinerary planning with day-by-day schedules, activity optimization, and social sharing options.
Support user authentication with role-based access, including social authentication for ease of access.
Implement a secure, flexible booking system with multi-payment options and real-time availability checks.
Allow users to provide reviews and ratings with moderation and verification to maintain quality and trust.
Incorporate a rewards system to encourage user engagement and loyalty.
Provide comprehensive emergency and safety information with offline access and real-time alerts.
Deliver a developer-friendly REST API with versioning and authentication for integration and third-party use.
Ensure responsive and accessible UI/UX with modern design standards and theme toggle support.
key_features: User Authentication and Profile Management with social media integration and role-based access control.
Destination Management supporting hierarchical categorization, detailed descriptions, photo galleries, geographic search, and approval workflows.
Tour Management including detailed itineraries, availability, guide info, and booking capabilities.
Personalized Itinerary Planning with schedule optimization, resource allocation, budgeting, public/private sharing, and social media integration.
Comprehensive Booking System for tours, accommodations, transportation with multiple payment gateway integrations and group booking support.
User Review and Rating System with multi-criteria evaluation, media uploads, moderation, and response handling.
Rewards Program managing user points and loyalty benefits.
Emergency Services providing local contacts, interactive maps, safety guidelines, real-time alerts, and SOS functionalities.
Transportation Management featuring schedule info, booking, route planning, price comparison, and environmental impact awareness.
Versioned REST API offering secure token-based access to all major features including destinations, tours, itineraries, and reviews.
Mobile-first Responsive Design with Tailwind CSS, supporting landscape orientation special handling and dark mode toggling.
user_flow_summary: User registers or logs in via standard forms or social authentication and manages personal profile and settings.
User browses and searches destinations by region, category, or keyword; views detailed information and photo galleries.
User explores and books tours, checking availability and receiving booking confirmations and tickets.
User creates and customizes personal itineraries, adding activities, accommodations, and notes, then shares publicly or privately.
User leaves reviews and ratings on destinations, tours, or services, including media uploads and voting on helpfulness.
User monitors rewards points earned from activities and redemptions via a dedicated dashboard.
User accesses emergency information relevant to their travel destinations including contacts, maps, and SOS feature.
Third-party clients access the API with token authentication to retrieve or manage data programmatically.
Admin users approve new destination entries, moderate reviews, manage tours, and oversee booking and user management through the admin interface.
validation_criteria: Successful user authentication and profile management, including social login and role-based access.
Correct functioning of destination CRUD operations with proper approval workflows.
Accurate tour scheduling, booking processes, and payment gateway integrations.
Complete itinerary creation with scheduling conflict warnings, budgeting accuracy, and sharing capabilities.
Robust review submission, media upload, moderation, and user reputation tracking.
Accurate points calculation and redemption in rewards system.
Emergency information is accurate, accessible offline, and real-time alerts are delivered.
Transportation data is current with booking and routing features working correctly.
REST API endpoints return correct data with proper authentication and authorization.
Responsive UI behaves as expected on various devices and orientations with theme toggle.
Application passes all automated tests and database migrations apply cleanly.
Documentation is comprehensive, clear, and up-to-date for development and deployment.
